microsoft_ft: Owned **end-to-end** resilience implementations for enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), driving **$14M+ business impact** across 45+ annual drills by running discovery, building trust, and translating customer pain into concrete product solutions.

Led 0→1 build of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, defining PRDs and self-service workflows on Azure that **cut operational toil 30%** and scaled the FDE-style validation function across cross-org engineering teams.

Shipped Azure's first proactive rack-level resilience drill in **4 months** with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a new continuous-validation model adopted across the platform.

Directed **14 cross-org executions** under executive visibility, serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud **network isolation** test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract** and navigating security, legal, and procurement review.

Built an **AI agent** for drill planning using LLM-powered workflows and prompt engineering, a daily practitioner pattern that **cut planning cycle time 39%** and lifted drill capacity **21%** across the team.

Partnered with GTM, product, and core engineering to deliver large-scale integrations with **Databricks, SAP, and NetApp**, re-engaging at-risk accounts and cultivating internal champions to expand Azure footprint.
microsoft_2023: Drove enterprise adoption of an **AI-driven code generation** tool across 14 Azure service teams via hands-on demos and workshops, **saving 37 engineering hours monthly** and proving daily-use value of LLM coding assistants.
Shaped the product roadmap for **intent-based YAML generation** by running 11+ discovery interviews with Azure service teams, translating customer pain points into concrete engineering requirements.
Migrated documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** (RAG) tool with rigorous metadata standards, **cutting lookup time 83%** and improving developer self-service across the org.
microsoft_2022: Unlocked **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions **28% faster** by aligning **140+ teams** on a unified automation prioritization framework spanning infrastructure and deployment.
Ran discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify 81 hours of manual toil per region launch, then built a roadmap automating critical paths across CI/CD and Infrastructure-as-Code workflows.
Engineered a **Power BI** dashboard with SQL-backed pipelines to track operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact investments.
amazon_robotics: Delivered **zero downtime** across a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by defining the cutover strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations in a distributed robotics fleet.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies and groomed the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and unblocking shipping velocity.
Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering on automated **CI/CD pipelines**, **accelerating deployment cycles 25%** and standardizing release practices across teams.
pro_painters: Grew job bookings **26%** by redesigning the CRM and managing end-to-end scoping and invoicing for **200+ monthly proposals**, cultivating customer trust through repeatable workshops and on-site discovery.
Cut Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and lifted conversions **2.7%** by executing a digital-first GTM strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to re-engage at-risk leads.
Surfaced margin leaks by running SQL-backed profitability analysis across **1,000+ project records**, reshaping leadership pricing models and informing expansion opportunities.
